race.description: Happy Birthday Wayne 'Scobie' Ryan Maiden Plate
race.comment: Tough race. STORM CAPITAL (3) looks hardest to beat. Overdue for a win and freshened since a close-up third over 1200m here latest. Looks hard to hold out. MIDDLE CHILD (9) found the 1200m a shade far two back but back to the sharper trip latest gave a big sight. Expected to do the same here. WHO ASKED ZOU (5) is a speedy type who could well be over the odds. Runner-up at second run back when led to the post and beaten a head at 100/1. Has a low draw and will take catching again. ROCK ON ANGEL (11)  is a mare that has had plenty of chances but has racked up a host of placings. has ability and should be in the mix. RADIO WAVES (2) has been thereabouts and looks next best.
